title: dev-flow: handoff Bead Type + Create/Resume Skill
summary: Design to make handoff a first-class persistent bead type with create/resume workflows, replacing the ephemeral handoff-prompt skill.
notes: Medium confidence: Status: Proposed and Supersedes fields + decision-making structure (Alternatives Considered) strongly indicate ADR, but /specs/ path and extensive technical schema detail create ambiguity. Content is primarily a decision document about making handoff persistent; technical specs are specifications *of* that decision, not standalone implementation contracts. Proposed status means not locked.
